steps.title: Use the ratio
steps.content: The ratio of blue markers to green markers is $7$ to $1$. So each group of $7$ blue markers corresponds to $1$ green marker.

steps.title: Scale the ratio
steps.content:
There are $42$ blue markers.
$$42\div 7=6$$
So the ratio is scaled by $6$, giving $6$ green markers.
The answer is A.
